scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:admin
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:frontend && npm run type-check:backend && npm run type-check:admin
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.setup: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:admin
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && npm install && cp .env.example .env && npx prisma generate
